{"cards": [{"name": "Depths of Knowledge", "mana_cost": "{3}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.
• Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.", "flavor_text": ""True wisdom lies not in knowing everything, but in knowing what to seek."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal blue sorcery that offers card selection and draw. The first mode gives immediate cards but requires deck manipulation, while the second mode provides pure card selection. Both modes are appropriately costed for rare and showcase blue's mastery over card advantage and library manipulation."}, {"name": "Cruel Dismissal", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with mana value 2 or less.", "flavor_text": ""Your services are no longer required."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple conditional removal at common. The mana value restriction keeps it balanced while still being playable. Black gets efficient creature destruction, and the instant speed provides tactical flexibility. The targeting is straightforward and teaches new players about mana value restrictions."}, {"name": "Grave Warden", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Cleric", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, target opponent mills two cards.
Whenever a creature card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, you gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "An uncommon with ETB mill and graveyard synergy. The second ability triggers on any creature entering any graveyard, creating interesting interactions. The life gain is incremental but can add up in longer games. Stats are fair for the cost with upside from the abilities."}, {"name": "Nethys, Death's Arbiter", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon", "oracle_text": "Flying, deathtouch
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, that player sacrifices a creature.
{2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card and each opponent loses 1 life.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "4", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "A mythic legendary demon with multiple black abilities. Flying and deathtouch provide evasion and combat relevance. The combat damage trigger creates inevitability, while the activated ability converts resources into card advantage and life loss. The mana cost and stats are pushed for mythic while staying within black's color pie."}, {"name": "Scorching Bolt", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": ""Precision and power in perfect harmony."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A clean, efficient burn spell at common. 'Any target' allows flexibility to hit creatures, planeswalkers, or players. The 2 mana for 3 damage rate is standard for red instant-speed removal/burn. Simple targeting teaches fundamental red gameplay patterns."}]}
